member.name: T:Emuera.Android.GameActivity
member.summary: Activity that runs the ERA game engine. Receives the game root path from MainActivity. Creates the SkiaSharp surface, registers platform services, and boots the engine on a background thread.

member.name: M:Emuera.Android.GameActivity.BuildInputBar(Android.App.Activity,Emuera.Android.Platform.AndroidConsoleHost,MinorShift.Emuera.GameView.EmueraConsole)
member.summary: Builds the bottom input bar with an EditText and submit button.

member.name: M:Emuera.Android.MainActivity.ResolveUriToPath(Android.Net.Uri)
member.summary: Converts a document-tree URI to a file-system path where possible. For primary external storage the path can be resolved; SAF URIs that do not map to a real path fall back to the URI string itself.

member.name: T:Emuera.Android.Platform.AndroidConsoleHost
member.summary: Android implementation of IConsoleHost. Bridges the ERA engine console model to the SkiaSharp GameSurfaceView.

member.name: M:Emuera.Android.Platform.AndroidConsoleHost.SubmitInput(System.String)
member.summary: Called by GameActivity input bar when the user submits text or selects a number. Fires the InputSubmitted event and also notifies engine directly.

member.name: T:Emuera.Android.Platform.AndroidLifecycle
member.summary: Android implementation of IPlatformLifecycle. Delegates to the current Activity to handle app exit and restart.

member.name: M:Emuera.Android.Platform.AndroidLifecycle.#ctor(Android.App.Activity)
member.summary: Android implementation of IPlatformLifecycle. Delegates to the current Activity to handle app exit and restart.

member.name: T:Emuera.Android.Platform.AndroidPlatformDialogs
member.summary: Android implementation of IPlatformDialogs using AlertDialog.

member.name: M:Emuera.Android.Platform.AndroidPlatformDialogs.#ctor(Android.App.Activity)
member.summary: Android implementation of IPlatformDialogs using AlertDialog.

member.name: T:Emuera.Android.Platform.AndroidPlatformDialogs.CancelAction
member.summary: Helper to satisfy IDialogInterfaceOnCancelListener with a lambda.

member.name: M:Emuera.Android.Platform.AndroidPlatformDialogs.CancelAction.#ctor(System.Action)
member.summary: Helper to satisfy IDialogInterfaceOnCancelListener with a lambda.

member.name: T:Emuera.Android.Platform.AndroidPlatformPaths
member.summary: Android implementation of IPlatformPaths. Stores game root in a caller-supplied URI path and uses internal app storage for saves/config.

member.name: M:Emuera.Android.Platform.AndroidPlatformPaths.#ctor(Android.Content.Context,System.String)
member.summary: Android implementation of IPlatformPaths. Stores game root in a caller-supplied URI path and uses internal app storage for saves/config.

member.name: T:Emuera.Android.Platform.AndroidPlatformSound
member.summary: Android implementation of IPlatformSound using MediaPlayer for BGM and SoundPool for short sound effects.

member.name: T:Emuera.Android.Views.GameSurfaceView
member.summary: Custom Android View that renders the ERA console display lines using SkiaSharp. Touch events are translated to button clicks and scroll gestures. Renders by drawing to an off-screen SKBitmap then blitting to Android Canvas.

member.name: M:Emuera.Android.Views.GameSurfaceView.SetConsole(MinorShift.Emuera.GameView.EmueraConsole)
member.summary: Called after construction to break the circular dependency with EmueraConsole.

member.name: M:Emuera.Android.Views.GameSurfaceView.ScrollToBottom
member.summary: Called by AndroidConsoleHost.ScrollToBottom to reset scroll offset.

member.name: T:Emuera.Android.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
